overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda series showing the protagonist Link climbing a snowy mountain at night. The character traverses steep snowy slopes, encounters a wolf, and passes a Snow Octorok enemy in a cold, starlit environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep snowy mountain slope with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: climbing up a steep snowy mountain slope using hands and feet, navigating rocky terrain

entered.detail: steep snow-covered mountain slope with patches of exposed rock
clear night sky filled with visible stars
rock formations partially buried in snow on the mountainside

segments.scene_description: Link begins ascending a steep snowy mountain slope under a starry night sky. The terrain is rugged with snow-covered rocks visible on the sides as the character climbs steadily upward using hands and feet.

events.description: a wolf emerges from the left side and runs past the character across the snowfield

agents.ego_description: running across a flatter snowfield section of the mountain at steady pace

notable_agents.action: wolf running from left to right across the snowfield, passing behind the character

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the distance under the starry sky

segments.scene_description: The terrain flattens into an open snowfield where Link runs forward. A wolf suddenly appears from the left, running across the snow and passing behind the character as they continue traversing the mountain plateau.

events.description: character approaches a Snow Octorok enemy camouflaged as a snow mound

agents.ego_description: approaching and carefully passing a Snow Octorok enemy hidden in the snow

notable_agents.action: Snow Octorok enemy disguised as a snow mound, remaining stationary as the character passes

entered.detail: small mound of snow concealing a Snow Octorok enemy

segments.scene_description: Link approaches a Snow Octorok enemy camouflaged as a snow mound on the snowy slope. The character passes the stationary enemy and continues moving up the mountain, with the mound passing from mid-distance to near the camera.

agents.ego_description: climbing a very steep snowy ridge, nearly vertical in sections, using hands and feet

entered.detail: rock outcroppings on the right side of the steep ridge

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Link climbing a steep snowy ridge, with the terrain becoming more vertical. The character continues the arduous ascent under the starry sky, navigating the challenging mountain terrain with snow-covered rocks visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Link ascends a rugged mountain, transitioning from a steep climb to an open plateau before returning to a vertical ridge under a starry night sky. It begins with the character steadily climbing a steep slope of snow-covered rocks, moving upward through the cold darkness. As the terrain flattens into an open snowfield, the camera follows Link running forward while a wolf suddenly darts across the snow from the left. The scene then shifts as Link approaches a camouflaged Snow Octorok, passing the stationary mound as it moves from the mid-distance to the foreground. Finally, the landscape becomes increasingly vertical again, with the camera tracking Link's arduous ascent up a steep snowy ridge flanked by jagged rocks.
